sense.definition: a type of soft hat with a rounded top and a firm peak in front, commonly worn casually or as part of a baseball uniform for sun protection

examples.x: He wore a baseball cap to shield his eyes from the sun during the game.
Every player on the field wore a baseball cap with their team logo.
At the stadium, fans sported various baseball caps in support of their favorite teams.
During practice, the coach wore a team-branded baseball cap to represent the team.
The coach handed out new baseball caps to the players at the start of the season.

sense.definition: a shirt worn by athletes representing their team or country in sports

examples.x: She proudly displayed her national flag on her sports jersey during the tournament.
Fans lined up to buy the latest edition of the team's sports jersey at the stadium.
He framed his sports jersey and hung it on the wall as a memento of his playing days.
The classic sports jersey design hasn't changed much over the decades.
Players exchanged sports jerseys as a sign of respect after the intense match.

sense.definition: a specialized garment worn by cyclists for comfort and performance during rides

examples.x: He bought a lightweight cycling jersey for summer riding.
The team's sponsor logo was prominently displayed on the cycling jersey.
Her new cycling jersey was designed for maximum aerodynamics.
He wore a bright yellow cycling jersey during the race.
They designed a custom cycling jersey for their charity ride.

sense.definition: a type of outerwear designed specifically for skiing and other winter sports

examples.x: She wore a warm ski jacket to stay cozy on the slopes.
The ski jacket's waterproof fabric kept him dry during heavy snowfall.
She packed her lightweight ski jacket for the ski trip to the Alps.
At the resort, skiers could be seen wearing colorful ski jackets of various styles.
The young athlete chose a bright red ski jacket to stand out on the mountain.

sense.definition: a tight-fitting garment worn during physical activity to provide support for the breasts

examples.x: She wore a sports bra to the gym for extra comfort.
Running in a sports bra in hot weather helps keep you cool.
Her favorite sports bra is designed for high-impact activities.
She replaced her old sports bra with a newer model for better support.

sense.definition: a garment that combines the appearance of a skirt with the functionality of shorts
a type of tight-fitting shorts designed for cycling, typically with padding for comfort

examples.x: The cycling team wore matching jerseys and cycling shorts during the charity ride.
He bought new cycling shorts that were more aerodynamic for racing.
She wore her favorite cycling shorts for the morning ride.
Do you prefer padded or unpadded cycling shorts for long rides?
The store had a sale on high-quality cycling shorts last weekend.

sense.definition: garments designed to be worn over regular pants for protection and warmth during skiing or other winter sports activities
pants that are loose-fitting above and tight-fitting below the knee, used for horse riding
a specialized garment worn by racers for protection and aerodynamics during competitive racing

examples.x: She wore a sleek racing suit for the Formula 1 race.
The racing suit hugged his body tightly, optimizing his performance.
Before the race, they inspected every seam of the racing suit for any signs of wear.
The team logo was prominently displayed on the chest of her racing suit.
His new racing suit was fireproof, meeting all safety regulations.

sense.definition: a tight-fitting garment worn for protection against rash and sunburn, typically used in water sports

examples.x: He always wears a rash guard when surfing to prevent irritation from his board.
The rash guard kept him warm during his early morning swim.
The lifeguard recommended wearing a rash guard to avoid skin irritation.
His new rash guard had UV protection to shield him from the sun.
She prefers a long-sleeved rash guard for extra coverage.

sense.definition: a garment worn around the neck to provide warmth in cold weather

examples.x: The team logo was embroidered on the neck warmer, making it a popular item among fans.
The ski instructor advised everyone to wear a neck warmer to protect against frostbite.
Cyclists use neck warmers to stay warm during early morning rides in cool weather.
Before hitting the slopes, skiers often wear a neck warmer to prevent cold air from reaching their necks.
His favorite neck warmer was knitted by his grandmother and kept him cozy during hikes.

sense.definition: a shoe made of thick cotton or leather used for playing sports
a pair of athletic shoes that is cleated at the sole, especially used for football
a type of footwear designed for sports or activities, typically with metal or plastic spikes on the sole for better grip

examples.x: He slipped on his spiked shoes before heading out for a morning jog.
She purchased a pair of spiked shoes for hiking in rugged terrain.
The football players wore spiked shoes to prevent slipping on the muddy field.
The cricket bowler's spiked shoes helped him maintain his balance while bowling.

sense.definition: a type of footwear designed specifically for horseback riding, typically featuring a tall shaft that extends up to the knee or just below
a footwear designed with specialized features for rock climbing, providing grip and suppor

examples.x: My climbing shoe slipped on the smooth surface of the rock.
His climbing shoe had a sticky rubber sole for better traction.
She tightened the laces of her climbing shoe before starting the ascent.
The new climbing shoe felt stiff but offered excellent support.
The climbing shoe was lightweight yet durable, perfect for long approaches.

sense.definition: a rubber shoe that is flat and has an expanded front paddle that enables one to swim faster
a light, soft shoe with a rubber sole, worn for tennis or on casual occasions
a shoe that is light, comfortable, and suitable for running and other sports

examples.x: She bought a new pair of running shoes for the marathon.
Running shoes provide the cushioning needed for long-distance runs.
A good running shoe reduces the risk of injury.
The athlete chose running shoes with extra arch support.
He replaced his old running shoes after noticing worn-out soles.

sense.definition: a type of shoe with two pairs of small wheels attached to the bottom, for moving on a hard, flat surface

examples.x: She laced up her skates and glided across the rink.
He bought a new pair of skates for the roller derby.
The children wore skates and raced around the playground.
She tightened the straps on her skates before joining her friends.
After renting a pair of skates, the children glided around the roller rink with joy.

sense.definition: a specialized footwear designed for use in alpine skiing that provides support and stability to the skier's foot, ankle, and lower leg
a boot with a blade at the bottom used to move quickly on ice

examples.x: She laced up her ice skates and glided gracefully across the frozen pond.
He sharpened his ice skates before the competition to ensure optimal performance on the ice.
The children bundled up in their winter gear and headed to the local ice rink to try out their new ice skates.
They rented ice skates at the outdoor skating rink and spent the afternoon skating under the open sky.
Ice hockey players rely on their ice skates to maneuver quickly and smoothly across the ice during fast-paced games.

sense.definition: a shoe with a set of small wheels attached to the bottom used for skating
a pair of soft shoes worn casually or during exercise
the traditional uniform worn in karate practice

examples.x: He wore a crisp white karategi to his first karate class.
The karategi was embroidered with his dojo's emblem on the chest.
She folded her karategi neatly after practice.
The karategi was made of lightweight cotton for ease of movement.
He adjusted the belt of his karategi before stepping onto the mat.

sense.definition: the traditional attire worn for practicing judo, typically consisting of a jacket and pants made from thick cotton

examples.x: He put on his judogi before heading to the judo tournament.
The judogi felt stiff and heavy as he tied the belt around his waist.
Her judogi was embroidered with her name and country's flag.
She folded her judogi neatly after the training session.

sense.definition: a traditional Korean martial arts uniform worn during taekwondo training and competitions

examples.x: The dobok's loose fit allows for freedom of movement during kicks and punches.
She tied her black belt tightly around her dobok before entering the dojo.
The school requires all students to wear a standard dobok for uniformity.
In competitions, competitors are judged not only on skill but also on the neatness of their dobok.
She washed her dobok after every class to maintain its brightness and cleanliness.

sense.definition: a type of traditional Japanese belt or sash, often worn in sumo wrestling

examples.x: The sumo wrestler tightened his mawashi before entering the ring.
Before the bout begins, the sumo wrestlers perform a ritual to adjust their mawashi.
The color of the mawashi can signify the rank and status of the sumo wrestler.
After each tournament, the mawashi is washed and carefully maintained by the sumo wrestler.
He tied his mawashi tightly to ensure it wouldn't come loose during the match.

sense.definition: a traditional Japanese garment worn during kendo practice and matches

examples.x: His kendogi was neatly folded after practice.
The kendogi's thick fabric protected him from the strikes.
He adjusted his kendogi before bowing to his opponent.
The kendogi's sleeves fluttered as he executed a swift strike.
The kendogi's white color symbolized purity and respect in kendo.

sense.definition: a sleeveless undershirt, typically worn as a comfortable and sweat-absorbing undergarment
a tight-fitting piece of clothing made of rubber that is worn by underwater swimmers to remain warm

examples.x: He zipped up his wetsuit before heading into the chilly ocean waters to surf.
The wetsuit provided insulation and protection against the cold currents.
She adjusted the fit of her wetsuit to ensure it hugged her body snugly.
The diver donned a wetsuit before plunging into the depths of the reef.
After a day of snorkeling, she peeled off her wetsuit, feeling exhilarated from her underwater adventures.

sense.definition: clothing items designed to be worn while swimming
a tight, waterproof hat worn while swimming to keep hair dry and protect it from pool chemicals

examples.x: She wore a bright yellow bathing cap to keep her hair dry in the pool.
The bathing cap's silicone material prevented water from seeping into her hair.
The young swimmer chose a patterned bathing cap to match her swimsuit.
The bathing cap's stretchy material ensured a comfortable fit without pulling hair.
Every competitive swimmer understands the importance of wearing a bathing cap for speed and efficiency.

sense.definition: a waterproof garment worn by divers, kayakers, and water sports enthusiasts to stay dry and insulated in cold water

examples.x: She bought a new drysuit for her upcoming scuba diving trip.
The drysuit kept him warm during the long hours spent underwater.
He wore a drysuit while diving in the frigid waters of the Arctic.
The kayaker put on his drysuit before heading out onto the choppy lake.
Instructors emphasized the importance of proper drysuit maintenance after each dive.

sense.definition: a specialized garment for divers to stay warm and safe underwater

examples.x: She chose a full-body dive suit to protect against jellyfish stings.
The diver put on her dive suit before entering the cold water.
His dive suit was equipped with extra padding for deep-sea exploration.
The dive suit included built-in buoyancy control for safety.
Before scuba diving, it's essential to check your dive suit for any tears or leaks.

sense.definition: a protective armor worn in Japanese martial arts, such as kendo

examples.x: He put on his bogu before the kendo practice.
The bogu is essential for safety in martial arts.
She adjusted the straps of her bogu to ensure a snug fit.
The dojo provided new bogu for its members.
His bogu was custom-made to fit his measurements perfectly.

sense.definition: a special glove with a webbed design and a deep pocket, used by baseball players to catch the ball
the traditional Japanese trousers worn over kimono, often used in martial arts like aikido and kendo

examples.x: The kendo master's hakama fluttered gracefully as he moved swiftly across the dojo.
In judo, beginners must learn the proper way to fold their hakama after training.
She tied the hakama securely around her waist before beginning her aikido practice.
The dojo's floor echoed with the swish of hakama as students bowed to each other.
As a sign of respect, students bowed deeply while holding their hakama.
